caption_ja: ねえみんな、Grokって知ってる？ 私、AIの織田信長みたいだって思うの！ 革新的で大胆、未来をガンガン切り開く存在。xAIが生み出したこのAIは、どんな質問もスマートに答えてくれるよ。SNSで話題沸騰中♪ あなたもGrokのパワーを試してみて！ #Grok
video_prompt: Generate a 10-15 second vertical video in 9:16 aspect ratio, cinematic anime style. Depict a futuristic Sengoku warlord inspired by Oda Nobunaga with sharp eyes, wearing black armor with subtle neon blue accents, standing in a night battlefield with digital fire and floating data particles. Include a fast dramatic camera push-in, wind effects, glowing banners, and social-media-era charisma. Ensure no text overlay or logos.
negative_prompt: Blurry images, poor lighting, modern clothing, realistic style, excessive colors, static shots, text elements, logos, crowded scenes, slow motion.
